---
name: Research proposal
about: Propose a research question for the project (Phase 1 / Gate G1 artifact)
labels: experiment
---

**Proposal file**: `docs/proposals/NN-<slug>.md` (use `docs/proposals/TEMPLATE.md`)

## Rubric checklist (all must pass before G1 consideration)

- [ ] Hypothesis is one falsifiable sentence
- [ ] Novelty claim cites specific lit-map entries
- [ ] Environment is truly laptop-sized (steps/run estimated)
- [ ] Seeds + variance reporting planned (n stated)
- [ ] Baselines get equal tuning budget
- [ ] Kill criteria are falsifiable
